# ProviderHealth

> Tracks provider health metrics for smart routing decisions

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| provider | string | yes | - | Provider name (openai, anthropic, google) |
| model | string | yes | - | Model identifier |
| successCount | integer | yes | 0 | Successful requests in current window |
| failureCount | integer | yes | 0 | Failed requests in current window |
| avgLatencyMs | float | yes | 0 | Average latency in current window |
| lastFailureAt | date | yes | - | Timestamp of last failure |
| rateLimitedUntil | date | yes | - | Rate limit backoff expiry |
| enabled | boolean | yes | true | Whether provider is available for routing |
| windowStart | date | yes | - | Start of current sliding window |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/provider-health` — List all
- `POST /api/provider-health` — Create
- `GET /api/provider-health/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/provider-health/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/provider-health/:id` — Delete
